scope: local in-memory orchestration core proof; not public launch proof and not durable Supabase restart/resume proof

project.prompt: Build a small commercial landing page app for a fictional product called AtlasCRM. It needs a hero section, pricing cards, testimonials, FAQ, contact form UI, and a launch-readiness checklist. Generate real app files and validation evidence.

blockersRemaining: This proof is local memory-mode orchestration-core evidence only; it does not prove production deployment or durable Supabase restart/resume.
External executor/API-key proof remains required before public launch claims.
Protected route proof with configured auth remains required before commercial launch claims.
